name: Randomized Spawner
description: A weighted random spawn system that instantiates prefabs from a configurable list based on probability percentages. Supports collision-triggered or event-triggered spawning with optional multiple spawn mode. Prefabs are preloaded for instant spawning and can be configured with individual spawn chances for loot tables, enemy waves, or randomized environments.
documentation:
## Randomized Spawner
Spawn random objects from a weighted list.

### Settings
- **Multiple Spawn** - Allow spawning multiple objects at once
- **Random List** - Configure objects and their spawn probability
  - **Prefab to spawn** - Select a prefab to spawn
  - **Probability %** - Chance of spawning (0-100)

### Tips
- Use **Start On Trigger** for event-driven spawning
- Set different probabilities for rare vs common items
- Great for loot drops, random obstacles, or enemy waves
author: stemstudio

startOnTrigger.name: Start On Trigger
startOnTrigger.description: When enabled, spawning is activated by an event trigger instead of automatically on collision.

multipleSpawn.name: Multiple Spawn
multipleSpawn.description: When enabled, allows spawning multiple objects at once instead of just one per activation.

prefabId.name: Prefab to spawn
prefabId.description: The prefab asset to instantiate when this entry is selected by the random roll.

probability.name: Probability %
probability.description: The weighted chance (0-100) that this prefab will be chosen when spawning. Values are normalized across all entries.
